title: Pin columns independantly

posts.author: olivier85 (Olivier Paillereau)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
When you pin a column, it takes all the columns before. It would be nice to be able to pin columns independantly in the list of columns, for instance column 3 + column 21 + column 32. If I pin column 32, it automatically pin column 1 to column 32.
Thanks !
